channel.title: Research on Intelligent Modeling Laboratory (IML)
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Intelligent Modeling Laboratory (IML)

item.title: Equation Discovery
item.description: Data-driven approach for discovering mathematical model to describe phenomena.

item.title: High-Performance Computing
item.description: Scalable iterative solvers for large-scale sparse matrix.

item.title: Data-Driven Wake Modeling
item.description: Reduced-order and learning-based methods for turbulent wake prediction.

item.title: AI for Science
item.description: Foundation and surrogate models for scientific workflows.

item.title: Reduced-Order Modeling
item.description: Fast and interpretable reduced-order techniques for high-dimensional systems.
